nasb.text: If he will not do these three things for her, then she shall go out for nothing, without payment of money.

esv.text: And if he does not do these three things for her, she shall go out for nothing, without payment of money.

cnv.text: 如果他不向她行這三樣，她就可以自由出去，不必補償甚麼。

ccb.text: 倘若主人不履行以上的三个条件，奴婢就可以随时离开，不用缴付任何赎金。
